name: Cream Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Beat in the flour until a dough forms.
3. Chill the dough overnight.
4. Drain the preserves, leaving most of the fruit pieces.
5. Roll out the pastry on a floured baking sheet to about 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds. Save scraps; form into a ball, chill, and roll again if needed.
7. Place a dab of preserves in the center of each round.
8. Fold the edges into crescents, sealing tightly.
9. Brush the tops with egg white mixed with water.
10. Sprinkle with ground nuts and sugar.
11. Bake at 325°F for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Watch closely as they burn easily.
12. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks. Store in an airtight container. These freeze well but are best eaten within a few days at room temperature.
